title: Coefficients
summary: Defines abstract composition coefficients and a placeholder closed coefficient system.

mathematicalContent.heading: Formal boundary
mathematicalContent.body: This page describes exactly the declarations present in Juhlformula/Juhloperators/Coefficients.lean; claims not represented by a declaration are not counted as verified.

limitations: Verified means that Lean checks the propositions encoded in this file and their imported assumptions. It does not assert that the present formal statement exhausts every analytic hypothesis or convention in the cited literature.
